description: Introduce a transaction-mode connection pooler (PgBouncer for GCP Cloud Run, or Cloudflare Hyperdrive for Cloudflare) between the horizontally-scaled app instances and the VPS Postgres, tune the postgres-js client for pooled use, and separate the migration/direct connection from the pooled connection. Prerequisite for the reactive query layer.
deviation_notes: All 4 phases complete. Local docker-compose runs PgBouncer 1.23.1 (port 6432). buildPostgresOptions sets prepare:false and env-tunable max (default 3). drizzle.config.ts + codecamp seed prefer DIRECT_DATABASE_URL with warning-on-fallback. Concurrency verified: 12 simulated app instances x max:3 driving 50 concurrent queries peaked at 8 backend connections (vs ~36 unpooled). tech-stack.md documents the topology. Production cutover (cloudbuild.yaml + DIRECT_DATABASE_URL secret) deliberately deferred so fallback keeps prod working.
